message:
feat(broadcast): add try_recv, receiver_count, len, is_empty APIs

Add synchronous inspection methods to the broadcast channel that were
missing and blocking the frankenterm tokio-to-asupersync migration:

- Receiver::try_recv() — non-blocking receive with TryRecvError
- Sender::receiver_count() — lock-free active receiver count
- Sender::len() / is_empty() — buffered message count

Also fix pre-existing nix 0.31 API breakage in kqueue test code
(dup() now takes AsFd, returns OwnedFd).

9 new tests, all 41 broadcast tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
